description.value:
Your guidance provides your allies with exceptional assistance on tasks that are second nature to you. When your allies @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Follow the Expert] and choose you as their expert, they gain a +3 circumstance bonus if you're an expert in the skill, or a +4 circumstance bonus if you're at least a master in the skill.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Practiced Leader]
